program_information.custom_ad_description: Full-page color ad featuring our 2025 "Worlds Collection" of custom rhinestoned country-western dancewear. The design will include a full-bleed background photo of a competitive couple in classic country attire, our Lone Star Dancewear & Accessories LLC logo, a short tagline ("Sparkle Under the Arena Lights"), and a QR code leading to our online catalog and measurement guide. We will place emphasis on UCWDC-specific costuming (Classic, Showcase, and Pro-Am divisions), with a small callout box mentioning rush-order availability for finals and last-minute alterations on site. Artwork will be provided in CMYK, 300 DPI, with all fonts outlined.
program_information.product_descriptions_line_1: Custom and ready-to-wear country-western competition outfits for leaders and followers, including Classic, Showcase, and Pro-Am divisions, with full rhinestoning and fringe detailing options.
program_information.product_descriptions_line_2: On-site services include last-minute alterations, emergency costume repairs, adding or replacing stones, hemming pants and skirts, and adjusting shirts, vests, and bodysuits to meet UCWDC dress code guidelines.
program_information.product_descriptions_line_3: Accessories such as belts, buckles, jewelry, hairpieces, practice tops, rehearsal pants, garment bags, and shoe care kits, with special discounts for multi-outfit orders and studio/team packages.
